mixes.name: Ron Trent - Tribute Mix (Mixed by Nick Harris)
mixes.file: Ron Trent - Tribute Mix (Mixed by Nick Harris)
mixes.audioFile: Ron Trent - Tribute Mix (Mixed by Nick Harris).mp3

downloads.file: Ron Trent - Tribute Mix (Mixed by Nick Harris).mp3
downloads.label: MP3

mixes.comment: Amazing Ron Trent tribute mix. Mixed by Nick Harris of NRK records. Awesome track selection, reflecting Ron Trent's solo work, as well as his work with Chez Damier (Chez & Trent). No copyright infringement intended, keep the old skool mixes alive! Please rate & comment.

mixes.name: The Madness Of DJ Guy
mixes.file: DJ Guy - The Madness Of DJ Guy
mixes.audioFile: DJ Guy - The Madness Of DJ Guy.mp3

downloads.file: DJ Guy - The Madness Of DJ Guy.mp3
downloads.label: MP3

mixes.comment:
This mix was recorded in August 2008 to promo the "Going Crazy EP" by DJ Guy.  

DJ Guy is available for bookings globally - please get in contact via the myspace page:  http://myspace.com/dj_guy  

Tracklisting: 

Intro - Beat Dominator - 2 4 6 8 Feel The Bass (Tekno Version) - Pandisc - http://www.discogs.com/release/212787
